response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine staff-level seniority and a recent, directly relevant signal in MCP server and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq, which maps well to the role's prototype-to-production mandate. However, the fit is materially weakened by the absence of Python from his skill set — the primary language for AI work in this domain — and no documented experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or enterprise customer-facing technical consulting. His AI-focused work appears to have started only in April 2025, which falls well short of the 8-year production-AI requirement. He is a strong generalist engineer who has recently pivoted toward AI tooling, not a seasoned applied AI practitioner.
strengths: Direct hands-on experience building MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq, which is a precise technology match for the role
Over 15 years of staff-level and senior engineering experience across diverse stacks and domains, demonstrating proven technical leadership capacity
Demonstrated ability to operate across the full stack and pick the right tool for the job, with AWS CDK and TypeScript production experience relevant to cloud delivery
concerns: Python is absent from his listed skills and nowhere evidenced in his history — a critical gap given it is the primary language for AI systems in this role
No documented experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation or observability pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI

No enterprise customer-facing or forward-deployed consulting track record; the role requires leading technical discovery sessions with external stakeholders, a pattern not supported by his employment history

key_factors.factor: No RAG / vector DB / LLM eval experience
